{{Quote|Bothan brandy and whatever passes for water here.|Ngani Zho orders the drink from a bartender on Port Nowhere|<ref name="LS3" />}}
'''Bothan brandy''' was a type of [[Brandy/Legends|brandy]] available in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="LE" /> An [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage, Bothan brandy was available for sale during the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], where it was served aboard [[Port Nowhere]]. [[Ngani Zho]] ordered a Bothan brandy and [[Water/Legends|water]] during a visit to the [[Space station/Legends|station]].<ref name="LS3" /> Bothan brandy was still available thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, where it was served during the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held at the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />
